texto: I find that when you do yoga, you don't crave unhealthy food. But I try to always let myself eat whatever I want. I have dessert or chocolate every day, but I'll only have a few bites. I try to have a little bit of cereal in the morning, and then I always try to have protein for dinner, too. But I eat pasta and stuff like that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rena Sofer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I find that when you do yoga, you don't crave unhealthy food. But I try to always let myself eat …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, food, day pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e day.

frase_original: I find that when you do yoga, you don't crave unhealthy food. But I try to always let myself eat whatever I want. I have dessert or chocolate every day, but I'll only have a few bites. I try to have a little bit of cereal in the morning, and then I always try to have protein for dinner, too. But I eat pasta and stuff like that.

texto: When I buy clothes, I like to buy them in outfits so I know they go together. I like a very simple, natural style. I never like to be the attention getter; I like to come under the radar and be cool about my look, very classic and stylish. I'm not into fads.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rena Sofer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes.
